title: Trash animals copper golems
description: Changes copper golem textures to "trash" animals - possum, racoon, bear cub and skunk.
body:
## What is this?
This resource pack changes copper golems textures to look like animals - possum, racoon, bear cub and skunk.

## How to install
Download and put in minecraft/resourcepacks folder. Then remember to select it in game.

## How to use
It is a completely vanilla resource pack and it will change textures of ALL your copper golems. The animal depends on level of oxidation:
- unoxidized - possum
- exposed - racoon
- weathered - bear cub
- oxidized - skunk

If you don't wax your copper golem, it will change texture over time - in the same way as it works with oxidation. Textures work both for alive golems and statues.

## Additional info
Make sure that you download pack for the right version of Minecraft. They changed names of files between 1.21.11 and 26.1 - it is changed in the pack, but they won't work properly if you use the wrong version.

If you like this pack, consider buying me a coffee ;)

Also, check out my other packs.
